label: tighten orbit volume — motes move within central inner region instead of orb rim
notes: Bodies were riding the orb rim because seed radius (0.25 world units) + loose escape_r (2.0) let them swing far from origin. Reduced seed R to 0.12 in _seed_state and brought escape_r in to 0.5; bumped restoring_k from 0.30 to 0.45 for a slightly stiffer central pull so they stay in the inner volume during their N-body interactions. Result: motes cluster + interact in the central ~40% of the orb's projected disk and have visible 3D depth motion rather than orbiting along the rim.
